name: Vercel
description: Vercel — CDN / Edge / Acceleration tool for developers

seo.title: Vercel Review 2026: Pricing, Alternatives & Lock-in Score
seo.meta_description: Complete Vercel analysis: pricing, lock-in risk, migration difficulty. Compare with alternatives in CDN / Edge / Acceleration.

lock_in.explanation: Medium — zero-config for Next.js = binding to Vercel platform

when_not_to_use: Non-Next.js frameworks — Cloudflare Pages or Netlify may be better
Need full backend hosting — Vercel is frontend-focused
Cost-sensitive at scale — bills can spike

migration_cheatsheet.risk_notes: Medium — zero-config for Next.js = binding to Vercel platform
migration_cheatsheet.tip: Moderate effort required. Export data before canceling

review.verdict: Best for next.js deployment with zero config. Vercel offers freemium, paid from $20/mo/member (Pro). Moderate vendor lock-in.
pros: Global edge network for low-latency delivery
cons: Non-Next.js frameworks — Cloudflare Pages or Netlify may be better
Need full backend hosting — Vercel is frontend-focused
Proprietary edge functions create platform dependency
